summary: Frontend testing of contemporary theme application across 12 pages. All pages except QualityControl have the theme correctly applied. QualityControl page has incomplete theme (stat cards missing gradient styling).

ui_bugs.issue: Stat cards missing contemporary theme styling - no gradient top borders, no glass-morphism background (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl), no colored text. Uses basic Card components while other pages like Inventory and Maintenance use styled stat cards

issues: Stat cards inconsistent with other pages - should have gradient top border and glass-morphism styling like Inventory/Maintenance pages

passed_tests: LeadsList (/leads): Gradient background (blue), glass-morphism filter card, colored status badges (Won=emerald, Contacted=yellow, Proposal Approved=teal, Lost=red)
AccountsList (/accounts): Gradient background (amber), 4 stat cards with gradient top borders (Total, Tier 1, Tier 2, Tier 3), glass-morphism filter card
TeamManagement (/team): Gradient background (purple), purple header icon, gradient 'Add Team Member' button
FollowUps (/follow-ups): Gradient background (cyan), cyan header icon, gradient 'Schedule Follow-up' button, glass-morphism calendar card
SalesTargets (/targets): Gradient background (green), green header icon, gradient 'New Plan' button
SKUManagement (/sku-management): Gradient background (orange), orange header icon, gradient 'Add New SKU' button, glass-morphism filter card
DailyStatusUpdate (/daily-status): Gradient background (rose), rose header icon
LeaveManagement (/leaves): Gradient background (sky), sky header icon, gradient 'Apply for Leave' button, glass-morphism cards
MasterLocations (/master-locations): Gradient background (violet), violet header icon, colored stat numbers (5 Territories, 7 States, 13 Cities)
Inventory (/inventory): Gradient background (blue), blue header icon, 4 stat cards with gradient top borders, glass-morphism table
Maintenance (/maintenance): Gradient background (slate), slate header icon, 4 stat cards with gradient top borders (Scheduled, In Progress, Overdue, Completed)
action_items: Update QualityControl.js stat cards to use the same styling pattern as Inventory.js and Maintenance.js - add gradient top border, glass-morphism background, and themed text colors
critical_code_review_comments: QualityControl stat cards (lines 70-115) use basic Card component without gradient styling
Should follow pattern from Inventory.js and Maintenance.js: Card with bg-gradient-to-br, gradient top border div, themed icons and text colors

success_rate.frontend: 92% (11/12 pages passed, 1 page with minor styling inconsistency)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Contemporary theme verified on 12 pages. QualityControl page stat cards need update to match Inventory/Maintenance styling pattern. LeaveManagement route is /leaves not /leave-management.

theme_verification.gradient_backgrounds: All pages have bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-white to-[color]-50/30
theme_verification.glass_morphism: All pages have backdrop-blur-xl on cards/tables
theme_verification.stat_cards: Inventory and Maintenance have proper styled cards, QualityControl does not
theme_verification.gradient_buttons: All primary action buttons use gradient styling
theme_verification.header_icons: All pages have colored icon containers with gradient backgrounds
